slides.title: Made in the *kitchen*
slides.body: You can't crunch off belly fat.

slides.title: Get *lean*
slides.body: Abs show around 10 to 15% body fat.

slides.title: Eat in a *deficit*
slides.body: Spot reduction isn't real. Lose fat overall.

slides.title: Train them *direct*
slides.body: Weighted abs build the look once you're lean.

slides.title: Stay *consistent*
slides.body: It's months of a deficit, not a 6-minute routine.

slides.title: Unhide your *abs*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the deficit that actually reveals them.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
